products.name: Men Quick Dry Workout Tracksuit Set
products.description: 2026 New Men Quick Dry Workout Tracksuit Set, Short Sleeve Athletic T-Shirt + 2-in-1 Double Layer Running Shorts, Breathable Lightweight Training Sportswear for Gym Running Swimming Beach

aplus.heading: Product Overview
aplus.text: This men’s athletic 2-piece sport set includes a quick-dry short sleeve t-shirt and double layer running shorts, designed for all kinds of sports and summer daily use. The top adopts breathable quick-dry polyester fabric, effectively pulls sweat away from skin surface and speeds up air drying, lightweight without sticky feeling after sweating. Crew neck and stretch short sleeves bring zero restraint for arm movements. The matching shorts feature a practical double-layer structure. The inner compression liner offers supportive fit and avoids see-through or chafing; the outer loose layer comes with adjustable drawstring elastic waistband, convenient to tighten or loosen as you like. Side split design greatly boosts mobility during running, jumping and strength training. Minimal brand logo decoration on chest and shorts hem, simple stylish solid black design.

aplus.heading: Fabric Composition
aplus.text:
• Premium Quick Dry Fabric: Made of high-quality polyester blend with spandex, ultra lightweight, moisture-wicking and sweat evaporates rapidly, keep you cool and dry during all workouts.
  • 2-in-1 Double Layer Shorts Design: Built-in tight compression liner prevents rubbing and private exposure; outer loose short layer with drawstring elastic waist for adjustable fit, side split hem for unrestricted movement.
  • Comfortable Athletic Short Sleeve Tee: Crew neck, raglan short sleeves, smooth stretch fabric, classic minimalist logo print, no tight binding, suitable for long-time gym, running and training.
  • Multi-Scenario Sportswear Suit: Perfect for gym training, jogging, running, swimming, beach, fitness, cycling, hiking and daily casual wear; ideal as workout set, swim trunks set and summer athletic outfit.
  • Multiple Sizes Available: L / XL / XXL / XXXL / XXXXL to fit weight range 42.5kg - 90.5kg, elastic fabric fits most body types, black solid color easy to match all gear.

aplus.heading: Applicable Occasions
aplus.text: Gym fitness, running, jogging, swimming, beach, cycling, hiking, basketball training, daily casual loungewear. Men Quick Dry Sport Suit Short Sleeve T-shirt Double Layer Running Shorts 2 Pieces Athletic Gym Training Set. men workout set, quick dry running suit, 2 in 1 double layer shorts, athletic short sleeve tee, gym training tracksuit, mens swim shorts set, breathable sportswear, lightweight fitness outfit, jogging suit for men, moisture wicking training clothes

products.name: Islamic Women Modest Burkini Swimsuit
products.description: Women Modest Burkini Swimsuit, Long Sleeve Zipper Two Piece Rash Guard, Tropical Print Full Coverage Leggings Conservative Islamic Swimwear for Beach Surfing

aplus.text:
Product Overview
This women’s modest two-piece burkini swimwear is specially designed for customers who prefer full coverage swimwear, especially Muslim women in the Middle East market. The set combines a long sleeve zip-up rash guard tunic top and matching full-length swim leggings, mixing solid color main body with tropical floral printed sleeves and hem for a unique fashion look, available in 2 classic color schemes.

Design Details
Top: Stand collar with half-length front zipper, easy to adjust tightness; long sleeves with tropical plant print; asymmetrical layered peplum hem to cover abdomen and hips, visually slim figure.
Bottom: High-waisted full-length stretch swim leggings, full leg coverage, elastic waist for all body shapes, no rolling down during movement.
Craftsmanship: Flat lock stitching to reduce skin friction, seamless inner layer for comfortable long-time wear.

aplus.column1:
Size                    Top Size                       Waist                      Hip          
           S           64- 68 cm         62- 68 cm        72- 76 cm
          M           68- 72 cm         68- 72 cm        76- 78 cm

          XL           76- 80 cm         76- 80 cm        84- 88 cm
aplus.column2:
• Fabric: 82% Nylon + 18% Spandex professional swim 
  • UPF50+ sun protection, anti-UV long sleeve design
  • Quick-dry & moisture-wicking, no water retention
  • High stretch & recovery, not easy to loose after stretching
  • Resist chlorine and seawater corrosion, long service life
  • No pilling, no color fading after multiple washes

aplus.heading: Bullet Points
aplus.text:
• Full Coverage Modest Islamic Design
    Two-piece modest burkini set includes long sleeve zip-front tunic top & full-length swim leggings. Mid-front half zipper for easy on/off, layered peplum hem hides belly and hips, meets Middle East Muslim modest dressing demands while stylish. Two tropical print color options: black floral & navy palm leaf print.
  • UPF 50+ UV Protection Long Sleeve Rash Guard
    Long sleeve full arm coverage blocks harmful sun rays, professional surfing rash guard fabric prevents chafing during swimming, snorkeling and beach volleyball. Stretchy long pants fully cover legs without tight binding.
  • Premium Quick-Dry Swim Fabric
    Crafted from 82% Nylon + 18% Spandex blend. Ultra high elasticity, soft skin-friendly, chlorine & salt water resistant. Fast moisture-wicking, dries quickly after water activities, no sticky heavy feeling. Fade-resistant, no deformation after repeated washing.
  • Functional Half-Zip Front & Flattering Fit
    Half zipper stand collar allows adjustable ventilation; asymmetric peplum hem optimizes body curve, hides tummy and hip flaws. High waist full-length leggings offer supportive fit, won’t slide down during sports. Contrast tropical floral printed sleeves & hem add fashion sense to solid color main body.
  • Multi-Scenario Versatile Swimwear
    Perfect for Muslim ladies, modest wearers, swimming, surfing, snorkeling, beach holiday, hot spring and pool training. Suitable for Middle East, Southeast Asia market demand for full coverage swimsuits.

aplus.heading: Product Features
aplus.text:
Applicable Occasions
Sea swimming, surfing, snorkeling, beach volleyball, hot spring spa, pool training, family beach vacation. Ideal conservative swimwear for Muslim women and ladies who want full sun coverage.

Color Options
  • Black base with pink & green tropical flower print sleeves
  • Navy blue base with palm leaf print sleeves

Cute tiny flap handbag for women, fits all your small essentials, hand/shoulder/crossbody 3 ways to wear, perfect daily fashion accessory.

aplus.heading: Retro Glossy Mini Flap Square Handbag
aplus.text:
Our new arrival women small square bag is launched in Spring 2026, combining classic patent leather texture and minimalist square silhouette, a must-have trendy accessory for modern ladies.
Made of high-quality soft synthetic patent leather, the bag features fine stitched seam craft as popular decorative element. The inner lining adopts durable polyester fabric, and the overall weight is only 0.1kg, super lightweight without pressing your shoulder.
This mini purse comes with dual carry accessories: a short handheld top handle and a 110cm long adjustable shoulder strap, you can freely switch between hand carry, single shoulder and crossbody styles according to your dressing look.
The flap cover closure design effectively protects your private items, with built-in inner patch pocket and zipper interlayer pocket to classify your lipstick, bank cards, keys and small change.
Four timeless glossy colors including red, dark green, black and gray are optional, easy to collocate with all your daily outfits. Perfect for daily shopping, casual dating, short walk and daily commute.

products.name: In-Ear Sleep Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds V6.0
products.description: In-Ear Sleep Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds V6.0, Soft Silent Sleep Headphones with AAC/SBC Audio Decoding, Small Noise Isolating Sleeping Earphones for Side Sleeper

aplus.heading: Specification Summary
aplus.text:
• Brand: SOBAST
  • Model: S16 Sleep Earbuds
  • Bluetooth Version: V6.0
  • Bluetooth Distance: 10 Meters
  • Earbud Battery: 30mAh; Charging Case Battery: 230mAh
  • Input: DC 5V
  • Supported Codec: AAC, SBC
  • Product Size: 5541.528mm
  • Compliance Standard: GB 4943.1-2022

aplus.heading: Bullet Points
aplus.text:
• 😴 Ultra-Soft Ergonomic Sleep Design for Side Sleepers
    Curved wingtip silicone eartips fit snugly inside ear canal, low-profile tiny shape won’t press ears when lying on side. Comes with 3 pairs of replaceable soft ear caps to fit different ear sizes, zero discomfort for all-night sleeping.
  • 📶 Stable Bluetooth V6.0 Connection, 10M Wide Range
    Adopts upgraded Bluetooth 6.0 chip, faster pairing and anti-interference signal, stable connection within 10 meters. Supports full Bluetooth protocols for smooth music playback, call answering and audio control.
  • 🎵 Hi-Fi Clear Sound with AAC & SBC Dual Decoding
    Dual audio decoding technology restores rich sound details, delivers soft balanced audio for white noise, podcasts, meditation music and bedtime audiobooks. Effectively isolate ambient snoring and room noise.
  • 🔋 Long Lasting Battery Life
    Single earbud built-in 30mAh battery, charging case with 230mAh storage. Compact pocket-sized case (5541.528mm) with Type-C charging cable included, easy to carry for travel, nap and overnight sleep.
  • Complete Accessory Package & Safe Certified
    Package includes S16 earbuds, charging case, Type-C charging cord, user manual and extra replacement silicone ear tips. Complies with GB 4943.1-2022 safety standard, reliable daily use.

aplus.heading: Full Set of Accessories
aplus.text:
1 × S16 Sleep Earbuds Charging Case

1 Pair S16 Wireless Earbuds
3 Pairs Replacement Silicone Ear Tips
1 × Type-C Charging Cable
1 × User Instruction Manual

aplus.heading: Wireless Sleep Earbuds – Ideal Headphones for Side Sleepers
aplus.text:
• If you are troubled by snoring, noisy room or want to listen to bedtime audio without bulky headsets, our S16 sleep earbuds are your perfect choice.
  • Comfortable Side-Sleep Friendly Shape
  • Different from ordinary protruding earbuds, this mini in-ear headphone features a slim hidden design with flexible silicone wings. It stays deep inside your ear without sticking out, so you can lie on your side all night without painful pressure. 3 sizes of spare ear tips are included to match small, medium and large ear canals for all-day soft wearing.
  • Advanced Bluetooth 6.0 Smooth Connection
  • Equipped with Bluetooth V6.0 chip, it pairs instantly with smartphones, tablets and laptops. The maximum transmission distance reaches 10 meters, no stuttering when you walk around your bedroom. It fully supports mainstream Bluetooth protocols, supporting hands-free calls, volume adjustment and track switching.
  • High-Quality AAC & SBC Audio Decoding
  • Dual audio decoding brings lossless sound performance. Whether you play relaxing white noise, sleep music, meditation podcasts or bedtime stories, the earbuds output mellow, clear sound while blocking outside disturbing noise for a quiet sleeping environment.
  • Portable & Long-Endurance Battery
  • Each earbud has a 30mAh built-in battery, matched with a 230mAh compact charging case measuring only 5541.528mm, light enough to slip into pockets and handbags. The package is equipped with a Type-C charging cable for fast, convenient power replenishment.
  • No more ear pain while sleeping on your side! SOBAST S16 wireless sleep headphones with portable charging case & extra ear tips.
  • Tiny hidden sleep earbuds for side sleepers! Bluetooth 6.0, AAC&SBC hi-fi sound, soft silicone fit all night, block snoring noise for better sleep.

products.name: 6-Cavity Train Silicone Baking Mold
products.description: 6 Cavity Train Silicone Cake Mold, Food Grade Silicone Chocolate Jelly Baking Tray, FDA Approved DIY Cartoon Train Baking Tool for Kids Party, Oven Microwave Safe

aplus.heading: Specifications
aplus.text:
• Material: Food-Grade Silicone (FDA Approved)
  • Cavity Count: 6 Cartoon Train Shapes
  • Dimensions: 30 × 17.5 × 4 cm
  • Net Weight: 145g
  • Temperature Range: -40℃ ~ 230℃
  • Applicable Appliances: Oven, Microwave, Roaster, Refrigerator
  • Suitable For: Mini cake, chocolate, jelly, candy, ice cube, handmade soap

aplus.heading: Cartoon Train Silicone Baking Mold for DIY Homemade Treats
aplus.text:
This 6-cavity train silicone mold is a fun baking accessory for home bakers and parents. Adorable locomotive and carriage shapes create eye-catching mini desserts to delight children at birthday parties, baby showers and daily snacks.

Made of high-standard food-grade silicone certified by FDA, the mold is safe, non-toxic and environmentally friendly. It supports a wide working temperature range of -40℃ ~ 230℃, working great in ovens, microwaves and refrigerators for cakes, chocolate, jelly, candy, ice cubes and handmade soap.

The soft flexible silicone enables effortless non-stick demolding. After baking, leave the mold to cool for about 10 minutes before taking out desserts for intact perfect shapes. It is reusable and will not deform or fade after long-term repeated use. Cleaning is simple: flip the mold inside out and wash with neutral detergent, either by hand or in a dishwasher.

Compact size 3017.54cm with a lightweight 145g body, built-in hanging hole for convenient storage when not in use.

aplus.heading: Bullet Points
aplus.text:
• 🚂 Cute 6-Cavity Cartoon Train Shape
    Features 6 individual mini train cavities, lovely locomotive & carriage design, perfect for kid’s birthday party, baby shower desserts, homemade chocolate, jelly, mini cakes and handmade soap.
  • ✅ FDA Certified Premium Food-Grade Silicone
    Passed US FDA food safety inspection, non-toxic, odorless, eco-friendly material, safe for direct food contact, no harmful substance release under normal baking temperature.
  • 🔥 Wide Temperature Resistance & Multi-Scene Use
    Heat resistant from -40°C up to 230°C, compatible with oven, microwave oven and roaster. Ideal for baking, freezing, making cold jelly and ice cubes.
    ⚠️ Note: Do not use microwave Crisp mode.
  • 🧼 Easy Demold & Dishwasher Safe
    Flexible silicone construction, just twist gently after cooling to pop out food perfectly without sticking. Reusable, no deformation or fading after repeated use; can be cleaned in dishwasher or warm soapy water.
  • 🛡️ Durable & User-Friendly Design
    Equipped with hanging hole for easy storage; flexible but sturdy structure. Avoid sharp cutters, steel wool scrubbers and direct open flame contact to extend service life.

aplus.heading: Instructions & Warnings
aplus.text:
1. Keep away from open flame and heating tubes of ovens; place the mold on the middle or upper rack, at least 5cm distance from heating elements.
  2. Clean with neutral detergent, sponge or dishwasher; flip the mold inside out for deeper cleaning.
  3. Do NOT use the Crisp mode of microwave ovens.
  4. Do NOT scrub with steel wool or sharp hard tools to prevent scratches.
  5. Let the mold cool down for about 10 minutes after baking before demolding for better effect.
  6. Proper operation can effectively extend the service life of the silicone mold.
  7. Do NOT scratch the surface with sharp objects.

products.name: Stainless Steel Milk Pitcher Coffee Frothing Pot
products.description: 201 Stainless Steel Coffee Frothing Pitcher with Spout, 250ml-720ml Multiple Sizes Milk Steaming Cup for Barista Latte Art, Long Handle Milk Jug for Espresso Cappuccino

aplus.heading: Commercial Stainless Steel Coffee Frothing Milk Pitcher
aplus.text:
This barista milk steaming jug is crafted from thickened 1.0mm 201 stainless steel with high-gloss mirror polishing, featuring a slim hourglass curved body and precision pouring spout, an essential tool for home coffee lovers and café shops.

The specially designed cut spout delivers steady, fine milk stream, making professional latte art much easier for beginners and experienced baristas. The long fully welded handle offers firm, heat-insulated grip, avoiding scalding when steaming hot milk.

Five capacity sizes from 250ml to 720ml cover all usage scenarios: personal daily latte, office coffee break, commercial café batch production, homemade hot cocoa and matcha drinks. The thick solid steel body will not dent or deform under long-term repeated use, anti-rust and anti-corrosion for daily contact with hot milk.

Smooth seamless inner surface reduces milk residue adhesion, can be simply rinsed with water or cleaned in dishwasher, no complicated maintenance required.

• ☕ Curved Spout for Perfect Latte Art
    Unique tapered cut spout design controls milk flow precisely, helps baristas create smooth delicate latte patterns; hourglass curved body prevents milk splashing while steaming.
  • 🛡️ Thickened 1.0mm 201 Stainless Steel Construction
    Made of solid 201 stainless steel with 1.0mm thick wall, sturdy anti-deformation, high polish mirror surface, rust-proof & easy to wipe clean, long service life for daily café & home use.
  • 📏 5 Multi-Size Capacity Options
    Available in 250/350/450/540/720ml, meet different demand: small size for single espresso latte, large capacity for family, coffee shop commercial batch steaming.
  • 🖐️ Ergonomic Welded Long Handle
    Integrated long welded handle stays cool during steaming, comfortable to grip without slipping, stable balance when pouring hot frothed milk.

products.name: 12L Slim Press-Top Plastic Trash Can for Home
products.description: 12L Slim Press Top Trash Can, Narrow Rectangle Plastic Waste Bin with Sealed Lid, 100% New PP Material Garbage Container for Bedroom Bathroom Kitchen Living Room, Multiple Deer & Letter M Print Colors

aplus.heading: Slim Press Top 12L Plastic Trash Can for Household
aplus.text:
This space-saving narrow waste bin is a practical storage solution for every corner of your home, crafted from 100% brand new virgin PP plastic for long service life.

The ergonomic press-button lid lets you open the bin with a single tap, keeping your hands clean without contact with waste residue. The fully covered sealed lid effectively traps garbage odor, avoiding fly and bad smell pollution in your bedroom, bathroom or kitchen.

Different from wide bulky trash cans, its slim long rectangular outline can slide into tight gaps between furniture, making full use of idle narrow space. The generous 12L inner capacity holds daily kitchen peelings, bathroom tissue and bedroom waste, lowering the frequency of taking out trash.

We provide multiple minimalist decorative prints including letter M and delicate deer silhouette in four neutral tones, coordinating with Nordic, modern, minimalist and ins-style home decoration. The solid thick PP body is anti-collision and not easy to deform after long-term daily use, just wipe with damp cloth for effortless daily cleaning.

aplus.heading: Product Specifications
aplus.text:
• Material: 100% Virgin PP Plastic
  • Capacity: 12L
  • Overall Dimensions: 25.5 × 17.5 × 34.5 cm
  • Net Weight: 0.61kg
  • Opening Mechanism: Press-Top Spring Lid
  • Body Shape: Slim Narrow Rectangle
  • Available Patterns: Letter M, Deer Silhouette
  • Available Colors: White, Black, Gray, Blue
  • Applicable Scenes: Bedroom, Living Room, Kitchen, Bathroom, Apartment

aplus.heading: Bullet Points
aplus.text:
• 🖐️ Convenient Press-Top Button Lid
    One-touch press lid design, no need to touch the dirty bin body. The built-in spring lid pops open instantly for quick waste disposal, simple and hassle-free daily use.
  • 📏 Space-Saving Slim Narrow Rectangle Shape
    Ultra-narrow long rectangular body perfectly fits gaps beside cabinets, toilet, bed and countertop. Won’t take up extra floor space, ideal for compact apartment, small bathroom and narrow kitchen.
  • 🛡️ 100% Virgin Tough PP Material
    Made of full new PP plastic without recycled filler, high toughness, anti-drop and crack-resistant. Smooth matte surface resists fingerprint and stain, easy to wipe clean.
  • 👃 Odor Blocking Sealed Lid & Large 12L Capacity
    Full covered lid locks unpleasant garbage smell inside, prevents bugs and odor spreading around the room. 12L large inner volume holds enough daily household waste, reduce frequent trash bag replacement.
  • 🎨 Multiple Stylish Prints & Wide Household Use
    Available in classic Letter M print and minimalist deer pattern in white/black/gray/blue, match modern home decor perfectly. Suitable for bedroom, living room, kitchen, restroom, vanity room and laundry area.

Slim narrow press top trash can! 12L large capacity, odor sealed lid, 100% new PP plastic, perfect for small bathroom & kitchen gaps.

  • Sizes reference: Large corner basket 26267cm / 25257cm; Toothbrush rack 1214cm; Soap tray 149.5cm
  • Packing list: 2 x Corner Shower Shelf, 1 x Vertical Toothbrush Rack, 2 x Soap Dishes, 7 x Adhesive Stickers

aplus.heading: Description
aplus.text:
Product Introduction

Upgrade your messy bathroom with our 5-piece wall-mounted corner shower caddy set! Crafted from solid carbon steel with anti-corrosion spray plastic surface treatment, this no-drill bathroom storage rack is built to resist rust and moisture in humid shower rooms. Modern minimalist line design blends seamlessly with all home decoration styles, available in classic black and clean white two color sets for your choice.

Product Advantages

✅ All-in-one 5 pack storage solution: 2 large L corner baskets + 1 vertical toothbrush holder + 2 soap dishes, meet all bathroom storage needs
✅ Heavy duty load bearing: 25-30kg max capacity, stable thick wire frame holds full-size shampoo bottles safely
✅ Waterproof & quick drainage hollow mesh: Prevent water buildup, avoid mold and rust growth
✅ Traceless adhesive installation: No drilling, no wall damage, easy to remove without residual glue
✅ Multi-scene versatile use: Shower, bathroom sink, kitchen wall, toilet, balcony, RV camper
✅ Lightweight total weight only 1200g, compact package easy for cross-border logistics

aplus.heading: Warm Tips
aplus.text:
1. The adhesive stickers only work on smooth, flat surfaces: ceramic tile, glass, marble, metal, smooth paint wall; NOT suitable for rough, textured walls, lime walls.
  2. Clean and dry the wall completely before sticking the rack, wait 24 hours to fully bond before placing heavy items.
  3. Do not install the caddy above hot water outlet to avoid glue failure caused by high temperature steam.

products.name: 5 Pack Straight Wall Mount Shower Caddy Set
products.description: 5 Pack No Drill Straight Shower Caddy Set, Rustproof Carbon Steel Wall Mount Bathroom Storage Organizer, Adhesive Rectangular Shower Shelves with Toothbrush Holder & Soap Dishes, Black & White 2 Colors for Shower, Kitchen & Toilet

aplus.heading: Product Specifications
aplus.text:
• Material: Carbon steel with spray plastic finish
  • Package Contents: 2 x Rectangular Straight Shower Baskets, 1 x Vertical Toothbrush Rack, 2 x Draining Soap Dishes, Matching Adhesive Stickers
  • Color Variants: Black 5-piece Set / White 5-piece Set
  • Total Gross Weight: 1200g
  • Max Load Capacity: 25-30kg
  • Mount Method: Traceless adhesive wall mount, no drilling required
  • Style: Modern Minimalist
  • Compatible Surfaces: Smooth ceramic tile, glass, marble, flat painted walls; NOT suitable for rough textured walls, lime walls and cement walls

aplus.heading: Product Overview
aplus.text: Tired of cluttered bathroom countertops? Our 5-pack straight wall shower caddy set brings you a full flat-wall storage solution, offered in matte black and pure white two color options. Built with thick rust-resistant carbon steel and spray coating, it stands up to constant bathroom moisture without corrosion. Hollow draining mesh keeps toiletries dry and clean, while matched toothbrush holder and soap dishes complete your daily washing storage system. The drill-free adhesive mount avoids wall renovation damage, making it the top pick for renters and families.

aplus.heading: Multi Usage Scenarios
aplus.text:
• Flat shower wall: Store shampoo, shower gel and large body wash bottles
  • Bathroom sink side wall: Organize skincare products, toothbrushes, toothpaste and facial soap
  • Kitchen wall: Hold seasonings, dish soap, cleaning sponges and small kitchen gadgets
  • Toilet & balcony walls: Arrange toilet cleaners, air fresheners and small sundries
  • Dormitory, RV & rental apartments: Removable design with zero wall damage

aplus.heading: Bullet Points
aplus.text:
• 【All-in-One 5-Piece Straight Storage Kit】
    This complete storage set includes 2 large rectangular straight shower baskets, 1 vertical toothbrush rack and 2 draining soap dishes, plus heavy-duty adhesive stickers as free gifts. The straight rectangular design fits flat wall surfaces perfectly, ideal for arranging shampoo, body wash, toothbrushes, facial soap, bath sponges and all daily toiletries in one matching set.
  • 【Dual Color & Durable Anti-Rust Carbon Steel Construction】
    Available in matte black and clean white spray coating to match modern minimalist home decor. Made of thick solid carbon steel with full spray plastic surface treatment, it is fully waterproof and anti-corrosion to resist rust in humid shower environments. The whole set only weighs 1200g, with stable metal wire frame supporting a maximum load of 25-30kg without bending or sagging.
  • 【No-Drill Adhesive Installation, Rental-Friendly Design】
    Comes with traceless self-adhesive stickers, no drilling, no nail holes, no wall damage and no residual glue after removal.
    3 easy installation steps:
    ① Wipe the wall surface clean and fully dry;
    ② Tear off the protective film of adhesive sticker;
    ③ Press the shelf tightly on wall and wait 24 hours for full adhesion before placing heavy bottles.
    Works great for apartments, dormitories, RVs and all smooth flat walls like tile, glass and marble.
  • 【Hollow Drainage Mesh & Space-Saving Straight Flat Wall Design】
    Open hollow wire mesh structure accelerates water draining rapidly, prevents standing water, soap scum and mold growth. Unlike L-shaped corner racks, our straight rectangular shelves perfectly utilize empty flat wall space beside shower stalls or sink counters. Raised surrounding edges stop bottles from slipping off during shower.
  • 【Wide Versatile Application for Multi Scenarios】
    Minimalist wire rack style fits multiple scenes beyond bathrooms. Mount it on shower walls for body care supplies, beside bathroom sink for skincare sets, on kitchen walls to store condiments and dish soap, or on toilet walls to organize cleaning gadgets. Lightweight package supports FBA shipping, suitable for North America, Europe, Southeast Asia, Middle East and other cross-border markets.

aplus.heading: Installation Warm Tips
aplus.text:
1. Make sure the wall surface is totally dry, dust-free and oil-free before applying adhesive stickers.
  2. Leave 24 hours after installation to let adhesive stick firmly before putting full-size heavy bottles.
  3. Do not install the racks directly above hot water outlets, as high-temperature steam will weaken adhesive viscosity.

products.name: Silicone Baking Mold Multi Shape Cake Bread
products.description: Silicone Baking Mold Set, Multi-Shape Non-Stick Cake & Bread Bakeware, Heat Resistant Reusable Silicone Loaf Bundt Muffin Pan with Anti-Scald Handles, Oven Microwave Freezer Safe for Home & Commercial Bakery

variations.color: Irregularly shaped circular baking pan cake mold

aplus.heading: Product Overview
aplus.text: Refresh your baking toolkit with our multi-style silicone baking mold set! Constructed with flexible food-grade silicone, this full set contains all mainstream pastry molds for bread, cake, donuts and brownies. Equipped with heat-insulated handles and non-stick surface, these reusable silicone pans support oven, freezer and dishwasher use, perfect for beginner home bakers and commercial dessert shops.

aplus.heading: Detailed Specifications
aplus.text:
• Material: Food Grade Silicone
  • Packing: Single OPP Bag
  • Available Color: Gray base with green grips, 
  • multiple colors for option
  • Temperature Range: -40℃ ~ 230℃
  • Core Features: Non-stick, reusable, foldable,anti-scald handle, uniform heating
  • Applicable Scenarios: Household baking, bakery shop, café  commercial production
Included Mold Shapes
  1. Serrated Round Cake Pan  
  2. Square Wave Baking Tray
  3. Regular Rectangular Loaf Pan
  4. Wave Texture Long Bread Mold
  5. Fluted Bundt Ring Cake Mold
  6. 6-Cavity Donut & Muffin Mold

aplus.heading: Bullet Points
aplus.text:
• All-in-One Multi-Shape Bakeware Collection
    This silicone mold kit includes serrated round cake pan, square wave tray, regular rectangular loaf pan, fluted bundt ring mold, wave bread mold and 6-cavity donut muffin tray. It satisfies all baking needs for toast, pound cake, bundt cake, muffins, donuts, brownies and pastry, ideal for daily home baking and professional bakery commercial use.
  • Premium Food-Grade Safe Silicone Material
    Made of odorless, BPA-free food silicone with wide temperature tolerance from -40℃ to 230℃. Safe to use in oven, microwave, refrigerator and dishwasher. Each pan comes with dual integrated green soft silicone handles to avoid scalding when taking out hot baked food.
  • Excellent Non-Stick & Easy to Clean
    Smooth inner non-stick coating enables complete effortless demolding without extra oil or grease. Flexible silicone will not crack or deform after repeated use. No food residue stuck on surface, just rinse with warm water or put into dishwasher for quick cleanup.
  • Uniform Baking & Space-Saving Storage
    Wave texture inside every mold accelerates hot air circulation to bake evenly with crispy golden crust. The soft silicone body can be folded flat to save cabinet storage space without permanent creases or damage.
  • Wholesale Cross-Border Supply & Versatile Usage
    Minimalist gray bakeware with multiple optional colors, packed in independent OPP bags for low-cost logistics. This baking set fits cross-border platforms including Amazon, eBay, Lazada, suitable for markets of North America, Europe, Southeast Asia and South America.

aplus.heading: Care Instructions
aplus.text:
1. Clean and dry all molds thoroughly before the first use.
  2. Light oil coating is optional for smoother demolding.
  3. Avoid sharp metal tools scratching the silicone surface.
  4. Cool down molds fully before cleaning to extend service life.
  5. Store flat or folded in dry, cool cabinets, avoid long-time direct sunlight.

products.name: Foldable XPE Baby Play Mat 78.7x70.9 inches Extra Large
products.description: Foldable XPE Baby Play Mat, 78.7"x70.9" Extra Large Double Sided Kids Crawling Mat, 1cm Thick Non-Slip Waterproof Foam Floor Mat with Storage Bag, Heat Insulated Playmat for Toddlers 0-3 Years Old

aplus.heading: Product Overview
aplus.text: This foldable XPE baby crawling mat creates a soft, safe dedicated play zone for toddlers aged 0-3. Constructed with eco-friendly elastic XPE foam, the 1cm thick mat delivers shock absorption to buffer baby falls. Featuring double-sided cute pastel print, four-season heat insulation and fully waterproof surface, it balances daily practicality and aesthetic. Foldable portable design plus matching storage bag make it perfect for household daily use and outdoor travel, also supports OEM customization for cross-border bulk orders.

aplus.heading: Core Specifications
aplus.text:
• Material: Eco XPE Foam
  • Unfolded Size: 200cm x 180cm, Thickness: 1cm
  • Folded Package Size: 914158cm, Single Weight:7200g
  • Packing: Independent Storage Bag, 6 mats per carton
  • Feature: Foldable, double-sided printable, waterproof, heat & cold insulated, non-slip, easy wipe clean
  • Applicable Age: 0-3 years old infant & toddler
  • Supply Info: Cross-border export dedicated source, OEM color & pattern customization available, main sales markets Europe & South America
Care Instructions

  1. Wipe surface stains with damp cloth; do not machine wash or soak in water for long time.
  2. Avoid sharp hard objects scratching the foam surface.
  3. Air dry in cool ventilated area, do not expose under direct blazing sunlight for long-term storage.
  4. Fold neatly into the storage bag when not in use to save space.

aplus.heading: Bullet Points
aplus.text:
• Premium Safe XPE Eco-Friendly Material
    Made of food-grade XPE foam, non-toxic, odor-free and free of harmful chemicals, passes safety standards for kids under 14. Soft elastic texture cushions falls effectively to protect babies’ heads and knees during crawling, sitting and tumbling.
  • Foldable Compact Design with Free Storage Bag
    Multi-fold segmented structure for easy folding into small portable size, matched with dedicated storage bag for convenient carrying and storage. Folded dimension: 914158cm, ideal for travel, apartment, small nursery rooms without occupying much space.
  • Double-Sided Usable & Four-Season Heat Insulation
    Dual-sided printed cute pastel pattern, two different decorative surfaces to switch use as you like. 1cm thick foam features cold and heat insulation function, keeps baby warm on cold wooden floors and cool in hot summer, usable all year round.
  • Waterproof Non-Slip Easy to Clean Surface
    Textured anti-slip grid design on both sides prevents slipping while babies play. Fully waterproof surface blocks liquid spills, just wipe stains with damp cloth in seconds, no liquid seeps into foam to breed mold or bacteria.
  • Extra Large Coverage & Wide Application
    Full unfolded size 200*180cm provides ample activity space for multiple toddlers to crawl, play toys and take naps. Suitable for home bedroom, living room, nursery, and supports OEM custom patterns/colors for cross-border wholesale to Europe & South America.

products.name: Standard Solid Color PLA 3D Printer Filament 1.75mm 1KG
products.description: 1.75mm Standard Solid Color PLA 3D Printer Filament 1KG Spool, Neat Tangle-Free Winding, High Speed Printing Compatible Consumables, Low Warp No Bubble Smooth Print Material for All FDM 3D Printers

aplus.heading: Product Overview
aplus.text: Our Basic Solid Color PLA filament is the cost-effective all-round printing consumable for daily FDM creation. Made of pure biodegradable PLA pellets with specialized formula, it features precise 1.75mm diameter, neat tangle-free winding, upgraded toughness and low warping performance. It supports both normal and high-speed printing, fits almost all FDM printers, with 12 rich solid color variants for diverse DIY, commercial and student design projects.

aplus.heading: Core Specifications
aplus.text:
• Material: 100% Pure Biodegradable PLA
  • Diameter: 1.75mm, Tolerance ±0.02mm
  • Net Weight: 1000g / 1KG per spool
  • Spool Size: Diameter 200mm, Width 60mm
  • Available Solid Colors: White, Black, Gray, Blue, Red, Pink, Green, Yellow, Orange, Purple, Sky Blue, Brown
  • Normal Printing Temp: 220℃-250℃, Speed 40-60mm/s
  • High Speed Printing Temp: 240℃-250℃, Speed 150-200mm/s
  • Heat Bed Temp Suggested: 60℃-80℃
  • Density: 1.27g/cm³
  • Key Features: No bubble, non-stick nozzle, low warp, high toughness, tangle-free winding, eco-friendly

aplus.heading: Usage & Maintenance Tips
aplus.text:
1. Store filament in sealed moisture-proof bag to prevent water absorption; damp filament needs drying at 50℃ for 4-6 hours before printing.
  2. For high-speed printing, set fan speed above 60% to get better cooling effect and smoother surface.
  3. Avoid sharp hard objects scratching filament surface to prevent feeding jams

aplus.heading: Bullet Points
aplus.text:
• Full Range of Rich Solid Color Options
    We provide 12 classic solid colors including White, Black, Gray, Blue, Red, Pink, Green, Yellow, Orange, Purple, Sky Blue, Brown to meet all your model design demands. Uniform saturated color without color difference, brings clean, bright finished printing works for crafts, figurines, architectural models and DIY projects.
  • Ultra Precise 1.75mm Diameter & Stable Extrusion
    Strictly controlled diameter tolerance within ±0.02mm, consistent roundness across the whole spool. Stable feeding flow eliminates nozzle clogging, blobbing and layer shifting, effectively avoid warping issue for finished models, delivers smooth fine layer lines.
  • Neat Layer Winding, Zero Tangling & Smooth Feeding
    Adopts automatic precision winding craft, filament arranged evenly without overlapping or crossing. Solve the common jam and knot problem during high-speed printing, reduce printing failure and material waste, far better than messy winding ordinary filaments.
  • Upgraded High Toughness Pure PLA Raw Material
    Made of 100% pure biodegradable PLA resin, no recycled filler mixed. Great flexibility & impact resistance, hard to break during bending and feeding. Low shrinkage, no bubbling, non-stick nozzle, no weird odor during melting, eco-friendly and safe for long-time printing.
  • Ultra High Compatibility & Dual Speed Printing Support
    Compatible with 99.9% mainstream FDM 3D printers on market, including Creality, Bambu Lab, Anycubic, ELEGOO, Raise 3D and more. Supports normal speed (40-60mm/s, 220-250℃) & high speed printing (150-200mm/s, 240-250℃), one filament fits all daily printing demands.

aplus.heading: Full Product Parameter Chart Title: Complete Printing Parameters for Normal & High-Speed Printing

products.name: Glow in The Dark Color Changing PLA Filament 1.75mm 1KG
products.description: 1.75mm Glow in The Dark Color Shift PLA 3D Printer Filament 1KG Spool, Neat Tangle-Free Winding, High Speed Printing Compatible Luminous Consumables, Multi Gradient Glow Colors for All FDM 3D Printers

aplus.heading: Product Overview
aplus.text: Our glow-in-the-dark color shift PLA filament combines gradient color changing and luminous glowing effects, with 10 optional color variants to meet diverse creative demands. Optimized for high-speed FDM printing, paired with neat tangle-free winding design, this 1kg 1.75mm PLA filament provides stable, smooth printing experience. The luminous feature makes finished models glow softly in dark after light absorption, widely used for figurines, architectural models, cosplay props and night decorations

aplus.heading: Core Specifications
aplus.text:
• Material: Biodegradable PLA
  • Diameter: 1.75mm, Tolerance ±0.03mm
  • Net Weight: 1000g / 1KG per spool
  • Package Size: 21cm × 21cm × 7cm
  • Core Features: Color shift, glow in dark, high speed printing compatible, neat tangle-free winding
  • Available Color Options: White-Yellow Green, White-Sky Blue, Green-Fluorescent Green, Pink-Yellow, Rose-Orange, White-Blue, Yellow-Green, Blue-Blue, Red-Orange, Rainbow Gradient
  • Recommended Printing Temp: 190℃ ~ 210℃
  • Compatible Devices: All Regular & High Speed FDM 3D Printers

aplus.heading: Usage & Maintenance Tips
aplus.text:
• Expose printed models under sunlight or LED lamp for 10-20 mins to get brighter luminous effect.
  • Store filament in sealed moisture-proof bag to avoid water absorption; dry damp filament at 50℃ for 4-6 hours before printing.
  • For high-speed printing, set fan speed over 60% to improve layer cooling and surface smoothness.
  • Avoid sharp hard objects scratching filament surface to prevent feeding jams.

aplus.heading: Bullet Points
aplus.text:
• Dual Effect: Color Shift + Glow in The Dark Luminous Performance
    This PLA filament features two special effects: gradient color shifting under normal light, and long-lasting luminous glow after absorbing light. Available in 10 color variants including white-green, white-blue, rainbow gradient, pink-yellow, red-orange etc. Printed models show soft luminous glow in dark environment, perfect for decorative crafts and night ornaments.
  • Optimized Formula for High-Speed Stable Printing
    Upgraded raw material formula supports high-speed printing up to 120mm/s without nozzle clogging, layer shifting or blobbing. Consistent extrusion performance shortens production time, ideal for hobbyists, design students and small workshop batch manufacturing.
  • Strict 1.75mm Diameter & Uniform Roundness
    Precision controlled diameter tolerance ±0.03mm across the whole spool, no diameter deviation. Stable feeding delivers smooth layer lines and high-precision finished models, fully compatible with all mainstream FDM & high-speed 3D printers on the market.
  • Precision Neat Winding, Zero Tangling Issues
    Adopts automatic layered winding technology, filament arranged evenly without overlapping or crossing. Effectively avoids knotting during high-speed feeding, eliminates printing failure caused by tangled wire, reduces material waste and operation troubles.
  • Standard 1KG Spool & Eco-Friendly PLA Material
    1000g net weight per spool, package dimension 21217cm, lightweight for FBA logistics. Made of biodegradable high-purity PLA resin, low shrinkage, low warpage and mild non-irritating odor. Recommended printing temperature 190℃-210℃, no heated bed required for most printing projects.
